milestones.title: Core Engine
milestones.description: Autonomous agent execution with git worktree isolation, dependency-aware scheduling, and model escalation.
items: Kanban board with feature lifecycle management
AI agent execution in isolated git worktrees
Auto-mode with dependency resolution and topological ordering
Model hierarchy: Haiku for small tasks, Sonnet for standard, Opus for architectural
Auto-escalation on failure (retry with more capable model)
CI pipeline: build, test, format, audit, auto-merge

milestones.title: Lead Engineer & Signal Routing
milestones.description: Event-driven orchestration with fast-path rules, signal classification, and per-feature state machine.
items: Lead Engineer state machine (INTAKE > PLAN > EXECUTE > REVIEW > MERGE > DONE)
Signal intake and classification (ops vs GTM routing)
Fast-path rules engine (pure functions, no LLM for routine decisions)
Escalation pipeline with HITL gates
Antagonistic review for PRD quality

milestones.title: Observability & Metrics
milestones.description: Full cost tracking, time-series analytics, and transparent per-feature economics.
items: Langfuse OTEL tracing on every API call
Metrics ledger with per-feature cost tracking ($0.56 avg/feature)
Time-series dashboard (cost, throughput, cycle time, PR velocity)
GitHub PR enrichment (commit counts, review timing)
Impact reports with historical comparison

milestones.title: Desktop App
milestones.description: Electron build for macOS with auto-updater, IPC testing, and CI workflows.
items: macOS DMG builds (x64 + arm64)
Auto-updater with version tag CI workflow
Playwright + IPC test infrastructure
Server lifecycle management in Electron

milestones.title: Public Launch Infrastructure
milestones.description: Changelog, roadmap, and stats pages. Content pipeline. Media blitz preparation.
items: Public changelog with 690+ PR entries
Public roadmap page
Stats data pipeline (git + ledger)
Blog post drafts: "I Stopped Coding" + "SaaS Is Dead"
Twitter/X content strategy and calendar

milestones.title: Command Bar & Quick Actions
milestones.description: Keyboard-driven command palette for the desktop and web app.
items: Cmd+K command bar with fuzzy search
Feature quick-create from command bar
Agent launch shortcuts
Navigation between board, terminal, settings

milestones.title: Community & Open Source
milestones.description: Public repo, create-protolab CLI, and $49 lifetime Pro tier.
items: GitHub repo public access
create-protolab npx CLI for scaffolding new projects
$49 lifetime Pro: methodology guide, agent templates, prompt library
Discord community
setupLab consulting offering
